mentions.note: Down 50% from highs — Cramer was bullish, surprised at decline. Flagging for deeper workup; industry still liked, specific company weakness concerning.
Data-center backup power supplier crashed 29% on margin miss, but thesis intact; ramp costs temporary; trades 10x FY2026 earnings vs. Caterpillar 31x, Cummins 21x; Cramer: dislocation is entry point.
